@mark_cullen I honestly think this bear market will be longer than others, and different. Different because some alts might be reaching cycle bottoms, while BTC has probably reached a cycle top.

I understand current market conditions aren't great for everyone, but we try to make the best out of it.

Based on my analysis, and as said before, I'm bullish. A local bottom should be forming here, and with all the liquidity building up above, a strong short squeeze is likely.

The algos have switched.

shortsqueeze.exe https://t.co/hi0972olyA

@Crypto_Chase $85k-90k would be the first resistance yes, but $100k-110k could be the second, which would make it even a better short squeeze because not even bulls are expecting that now.

In any case, I agree we see bearish continuation after that.

$BTC

Main support zone reached. Confluence of OB + 2021 ATHs (November and April) + 2024 ATH. Most alts also at HTF support. 

Lots of liquidity above, and shorts are aggressive here. Sentiment can't be more negative.

There's no better time for a strong bounce (short squeeze) https://t.co/1n6Sr7gjpi
Everything is lining up for a massive short squeeze.
Often, this is where the majority panics and turns bearish, and the market finds a local bottom. https://t.co/XQiF8PCJ0k
